test.details: All tests pass with race detection enabled. 12+ tracing tests, 70+ helper tests, 5 extraction tests all passing.

lint.details: 106 lint issues found: 88 dupl (pre-existing code duplication), 18 staticcheck (minor suggestions). These are pre-existing issues not introduced by the utils-fixes.

typecheck.details: Go compilation successful. No type errors.

featureReviews.summary: Race condition fix in Stop() method correctly reorders channel closure before wg.Wait() to prevent workers writing to closed channels.
Nil pointer fix in FormattingReplacerWithLanguage() properly adds nil check with translation key fallback for anonymous/channel messages.
Nil check for msg parameter in GetNoteAndFilterType() correctly prevents panic when accessing msg.Text.
Bounds checking consolidated in ExtractUserAndText() by introducing hasArgs variable, simplifying control flow.
Documentation added explaining Go escape analysis safety for pointer returns from local variables in extractChatFromContext().
Error recording fixed in ProcessUpdate() using named return values and defer to ensure errors recorded before span ends.
Stop mechanism added for keyword matcher cleanup goroutine to prevent leaks during tests.

summary: All 7 features in the utils-fixes milestone have passed scrutiny review. The fixes address race conditions, nil pointer vulnerabilities, bounds checking, documentation gaps, tracing errors, and goroutine leaks. All tests pass with race detection. Lint warnings are pre-existing code duplication issues not related to these fixes.
